_comment: Copy this file to .claude/feature-planner.json in your project root and fill in your values.
project_description: a brief description of your platform and its purpose
services_overview:
Describe your platform's services, layers, and tech stack here.
This text is injected into the BDA agent so it understands your architecture.

Example:
  Backend services: UserService, OrderService, NotificationService
  Frontend: Admin dashboard (Next.js), Customer portal (React/Vite)
  Shared library: MyApp.Shared — DTOs and constants
  Tech: Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ

referenceFiles._comment: Files listed here are read and inlined into matching agent prompts.
referenceFiles._comment2: Paths are relative to the project root (cwd). Use 'all' to inject into every agent.

customInstructions._comment: Freetext appended to the matching agent's prompt. Leave empty string to skip.
